nl_query: find faculty assigned fewer than 10 answer script
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.employee_id, fc.name, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS script_count
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.evaluator_id = fc.employee_id
JOIN   answer_script a ON a.id = sa.script_id
WHERE  a.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY fc.employee_id, fc.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) < 10
ORDER  BY script_count DESC;
error:
Execution error: column a.is_active does not exist
LINE 5: WHERE  a.is_active = TRUE
               ^
HINT:  Perhaps you meant to reference the column "sa.is_active".
